Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-25-2017 Continued To Aug-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on August 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why an Inventory and Appraisal and a Petition for Final Distribution have not been filed. Status on close of the estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2015 Continued To Jan-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-30-2015 Continued To Dec-14-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Petitioner Epifanio Venegas, in pro per; Rosa Venegas.

The Court informed the Petitioner that there were several prodedural issues outlined in the Investigator's Notes which needed to be addressed. Mr. Venegas informed the Court that he did not time to file a response after receiving the notes, but that he intended to file a declaration today which responded to the notes, and to submit proof of publication.
The matter was continued to December 14,2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court cautioned the Petitiner that probate procedures were very complicated, and that he might need the assistance of legal counsel to address the deficiencies raised in the notes.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.
